quotes.text: grug have cardinal rule: never refactor and change functionality at same time. grug see mass mass senior devs do this and mass mass problems every time.
quotes.author: The Grug Brained Developer

quotes.text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.
quotes.author: Donald Knuth
quotes.source: Structured Programming with go to Statements, 1974

quotes.text: Debugging is twice as hard as writing the code in the first place. Therefore, if you write the code as cleverly as possible, you are, by definition, not smart enough to debug it.
quotes.author: Brian Kernighan

quotes.text: There are two ways of constructing a software design: One way is to make it so simple that there are obviously no deficiencies, and the other way is to make it so complicated that there are no obvious deficiencies. The first method is far more difficult.
quotes.author: C.A.R. Hoare
quotes.source: The Emperor's Old Clothes, 1980 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: I think that 'good taste' is much more about the ability to see and understand that simplicity — and to prefer it over cleverness.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Bad programmers worry about the code. Good programmers worry about data structures and their relationships.
quotes.author: Linus Torvalds

quotes.text: Adding manpower to a late software project makes it later.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: There is no single development, in either technology or in management technique, that by itself promises even one order-of-magnitude improvement in productivity, in reliability, in simplicity.
quotes.author: Fred Brooks

quotes.text: Testing shows the presence, not the absence of bugs.
quotes.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra

quotes.text: Simplicity is prerequisite for reliability.
quotes.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra

quotes.text: The competent programmer is fully aware of the strictly limited size of his own skull; therefore he approaches the programming task in full humility.
quotes.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra
quotes.source: The Humble Programmer, 1972 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: A little copying is better than a little dependency.
quotes.author: Rob Pike

quotes.text: Data dominates. If you've chosen the right data structures and organized things well, the algorithms will almost always be self-evident.
quotes.author: Rob Pike

quotes.text: This is the Unix philosophy: Write programs that do one thing and do it well. Write programs to work together. Write programs to handle text streams, because that is a universal interface.
quotes.author: Doug McIlroy

quotes.text: You can't trust code that you did not totally create yourself.
quotes.author: Ken Thompson
quotes.source: Reflections on Trusting Trust, 1984 Turing Award Lecture

quotes.text: Simple is not easy. Easy is near to our capabilities. Simple is about lack of interleaving. They are completely orthogonal.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey

quotes.text: Every time I see someone come out with an answer in a day, I know they don't understand the problem yet.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey

quotes.text: State. You're doing it wrong.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey
quotes.source: Are We There Yet?, JVM Language Summit 2009

quotes.text: Design is not making a UML diagram. Design is about taking things apart in such a way that they can be put back together.
quotes.author: Rich Hickey

quotes.text: I want the simplest possible thing that satisfies my actual requirements, and I want to understand every single line of it.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: Each layer of abstraction is a layer of bugs, a layer of performance problems, and a layer of things you don't understand.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: The hardest bugs are the ones where your mental model is wrong. You don't see the bug because you're looking at the world wrong.
quotes.author: Bryan Cantrill

quotes.text: Some people, when confronted with a problem, think 'I know, I'll use regular expressions.' Now they have two problems.
quotes.author: Jamie Zawinski

quotes.text: There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.
quotes.author: Bjarne Stroustrup
quotes.source: The Design and Evolution of C++

quotes.text: The generation of random numbers is too important to be left to chance.
quotes.author: Robert R. Coveyou

quotes.text: The first rule of programming: if it works, don't touch it. The second rule: see the first rule.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Charge more.
quotes.author: Patrick McKenzie (patio11)

quotes.text: Do things that don't scale.
quotes.author: Paul Graham

quotes.text: A single meeting can blow a whole afternoon, by breaking it into two pieces each too small to do anything hard in.
quotes.author: Paul Graham

quotes.text: All non-trivial abstractions, to some degree, are leaky.
quotes.author: Joel Spolsky

quotes.text: The single worst strategic mistake that any software company can make: rewrite the code from scratch.
quotes.author: Joel Spolsky
quotes.source: Things You Should Never Do, Part I, 2000

quotes.text: Teach Yourself Programming in Ten Years.
quotes.author: Peter Norvig

quotes.text: Focused, hard work is the real key to success. Keep your eyes on the goal, and just keep taking the next step towards completing it.
quotes.author: John Carmack

quotes.text: Implementation is the great filter. A lot of brilliant ideas die because nobody wants to do the unglamorous work.
quotes.author: John Carmack

quotes.text: The real lesson is: finish things. Not starting is fine. Not finishing is a problem.
quotes.author: Gwern Branwen

quotes.text: Given enough eyeballs, all bugs are shallow.
quotes.author: Eric S. Raymond

quotes.text: A language that doesn't affect the way you think about programming, is not worth knowing.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: Optimization hinders evolution. Everything should be built top-down, except the first time.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: The most important thing in software engineering is not which tools or methodologies you use. It's finishing the damn thing.
quotes.author: Steve Yegge

quotes.text: The best code is no code at all. Every new line of code you willingly bring into the world is code that has to be debugged, code that has to be read and understood, code that has to be supported.
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood
quotes.source: The Best Code is No Code At All, 2007

quotes.text: More computing sins are committed in the name of efficiency (without necessarily achieving it) than for any other single reason — including blind stupidity.
quotes.author: W.A. Wulf

quotes.text: Legacy code is simply code without tests.
quotes.author: Michael Feathers

quotes.text: Duplication is far cheaper than the wrong abstraction.
quotes.author: Sandi Metz

quotes.text: Nothing is more permanent than a temporary solution that works.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Documentation is a love letter that you write to your future self.
quotes.author: Damian Conway

quotes.text: A 10x developer is someone who makes 5 other developers 2x more productive. Not someone who writes 10x more code.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Deleted code is debugged code.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: When in doubt, use brute force.
quotes.author: Ken Thompson

quotes.text: The right thing is frequently a mass mass complex thing. Worse is better. New Jersey style wins.
quotes.author: Richard P. Gabriel

quotes.text: You aren't gonna need it.
quotes.author: Ron Jeffries / XP

quotes.text: Always leave the code better than you found it.
quotes.author: Robert C. Martin (Uncle Bob)
quotes.source: Clean Code (adapted from Boy Scout Rule)

quotes.text: The three chief virtues of a programmer are: Laziness, Impatience, and Hubris.
quotes.author: Larry Wall

quotes.text: All problems in computer science can be solved by another level of indirection... except for the problem of too many layers of indirection.
quotes.author: Butler Lampson (modified)
quotes.source: Attributed, with modification from David Wheeler's original

quotes.text: In theory, there is no difference between theory and practice. In practice, there is.
quotes.author: Yogi Berra (applied to programming)

quotes.text: The nice thing about standards is that there are so many to choose from.
quotes.author: Andrew S. Tanenbaum

quotes.text: Users will always find a way to use your software in the worst possible way you never imagined.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: A bug becomes a feature the moment a customer depends on it.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Good design is as little design as possible. Less, but better.
quotes.author: Dieter Rams

quotes.text: The first 90% of the code accounts for the first 90% of the development time. The remaining 10% accounts for the other 90%.
quotes.author: Tom Cargill

quotes.text: If debugging is the process of removing bugs, then programming must be the process of putting them in.
quotes.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra

quotes.text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil. But premature abstraction is the root of all suffering.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: A 10x developer isn't someone who codes 10x faster. It's someone who creates 10x less work for everyone else.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The worst part about being a senior developer isn't the complexity. It's knowing that the simple solution you proposed was right all along.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Rewriting from scratch is always tempting. It's also always a terrible idea. But you won't believe me until you've done it yourself.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every good abstraction starts as 'this is so simple!' and ends as 'I can't believe how complex this is.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Code that's easy to delete is better than code that's easy to write.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best code is no code at all. Every line of code is a liability.
quotes.author: Jeff Atwood

quotes.text: Simplicity is a prerequisite for reliability.
quotes.author: Edsger W. Dijkstra

quotes.text: The function of good software is to make the complex appear to be simple.
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
quotes.author: John Johnson

quotes.text: Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.
quotes.author: Martin Fowler

quotes.text: The most dangerous phrase in the language is: 'We've always done it this way.'
quotes.author: Grace Hopper

quotes.text: The best time to refactor is when the code is fresh in your mind. The worst time is when you're debugging a production incident at 3 AM.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: You can't refactor what you can't read. You can't read what you can't understand. Start there.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The difference between a senior and a junior dev isn't knowledge. It's knowing which shortcuts will haunt you later.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers aren't the ones who write the most code. They're the ones who delete the most code.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Naming things is easy. Naming things well is a skill. Naming things in a way that still makes sense 2 years later is a superpower.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best architects are the ones who can draw boundaries, not the ones who can draw boxes.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most expensive part of software isn't the code. It's the maintenance. Plan for it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you can't explain it to a six-year-old, you don't understand it. If your code can't be read by a junior dev, you haven't simplified it.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The worst kind of technical debt is the kind you don't know you have.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Productivity is never an accident. It is always the result of commitment to excellence, intelligent planning, and focused effort.
quotes.author: Paul J. Meyer

quotes.text: The key is not to prioritize what's on your schedule, but to schedule your priorities.
quotes.author: Stephen Covey

quotes.text: Productivity is doing more of what matters. Not doing more things.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most productive people aren't the ones who do the most. They're the ones who say no the most.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If your calendar is full, you're not productive. You're just busy. There's a difference.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Batch your shallow work. Protect your deep work. Ignore everything else.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to get something done is to begin. Not to plan. Not to research. Not to optimize. Begin.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Burnout isn't caused by working too hard. It's caused by working too hard on things that don't matter.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Done is better than perfect. But also: good is better than done-but-broken.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Time management is really just priority management. If everything is a priority, nothing is.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The real productivity hack is caring less about productivity hacks and more about the work.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Revenue is vanity, profit is sanity, cash flow is reality.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you're not embarrassed by your first release, you launched too late.
quotes.author: Reid Hoffman

quotes.text: Don't find customers for your product. Find products for your customers.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: Vision without execution is hallucination.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Scarcity creates value. If everyone can do what you do, you're competing on price. If nobody can, you're competing on nothing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Compounding works for businesses the same way it works for interest. Small, consistent improvements beat moonshot pivots every time.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The aim of marketing is to know and understand the customer so well the product or service fits them and sells itself.
quotes.author: Peter Drucker

quotes.text: The best marketing strategy is having a product people actually want to tell their friends about.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best SaaS moat isn't technology. It's habit. Make yourself part of their daily workflow and you're unmovable.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The customer is always right about the problem. They're almost always wrong about the solution.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best code you'll ever write is the code you delete.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: A function that does one thing well is worth a thousand functions that do everything poorly.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Write code as if the person maintaining it is a violent psychopath who knows where you live.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best developers aren't the ones who write the most clever code. They're the ones who write the most boring code that works.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your code is a love letter to the future developer who maintains it. Write it like you care about their mental health.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Revenue doesn't lie. Everything else might.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to get more done is to stop doing things that don't matter. It sounds obvious. It isn't.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most. Most people choose now.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best time management trick is realizing you can't manage time. You can only manage yourself.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers write the fewest lines of code. The worst engineers write the most features.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers leave code better than they found it. The worst leave it worse than they found it. Most leave it the same.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers don't write more code. They write less code that does more.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to improve your code is to delete half of it. Then delete half again.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers are the ones who make other engineers better. Write code that teaches.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every line of code is a liability. Every feature is a bet. Every deploy is a risk. Ship accordingly.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers are lazy in the right ways: lazy about doing things twice, not lazy about doing things right.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best career advice is: nobody is coming to save you. You have to build your own thing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your first job teaches you skills. Your second teaches you politics. Your third teaches you which one matters more.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you're not embarrassed by your code from 6 months ago, you're not growing.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Most business advice is survivorship bias. The successful founders tell you what worked. The failed ones knew what didn't.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best marketing is a product that sells itself. The second best is a customer who sells it for you.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Knowledge is power. Applied knowledge is superpower. Hoarded knowledge is a hoarder.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The most productive people aren't busy. They're focused. Busy is noise. Focus is signal.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best productivity hack is caring deeply about what you're working on. Everything else is optimization.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your future self is a stranger you're building a life for. Be kind to them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers know that premature abstraction is worse than premature optimization.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers don't just write code. They write the tools that help others write code.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers know the difference between clever code and clear code. They choose clear.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Simplicity is the ultimate sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.
quotes.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

quotes.text: The best is the enemy of the good.
quotes.author: Voltaire

quotes.text: Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
quotes.author: Kent Beck

quotes.text: The only way to go fast is to go well.
quotes.author: Robert C. Martin

quotes.text: Programs must be written for people to read, and only incidentally for machines to execute.
quotes.author: Harold Abelson

quotes.text: The purpose of software engineering is to control complexity, not to create it.
quotes.author: Barbara Liskov

quotes.text: Simplicity does not precede complexity, but follows it.
quotes.author: Alan Perlis

quotes.text: Measuring programming progress by lines of code is like measuring aircraft building progress by weight.
quotes.author: Bill Gates

quotes.text: The most important property of a program is whether it accomplishes the intention of its user.
quotes.author: C.A.R. Hoare

quotes.text: Worse is better.
quotes.author: Richard P. Gabriel

quotes.text: Controlling complexity is the essence of computer programming.
quotes.author: Brian Kernighan

quotes.text: If you can't explain it simply, you don't understand it well enough.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The best engineers are the ones who know what not to build.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every system is perfectly designed to get the results it gets.
quotes.author: W. Edwards Deming

quotes.text: Money follows value. Create enough value and the money will come.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best engineers are the ones who can debug without looking at the code. They understand the system, not just the syntax.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to prevent bugs is to write simple code. Simple code has fewer places to hide bugs.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Without data, you're just another person with an opinion.
quotes.author: W. Edwards Deming

quotes.text: Failure is not the opposite of success. It's part of it.
quotes.author: Arianna Huffington

quotes.text: The biggest risk is not taking any risk.
quotes.author: Mark Zuckerberg

quotes.text: Every mistake is a lesson. Every lesson makes you better. Fail fast, learn faster.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The best way to learn is to fail. The second best is to learn from someone else's failure.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Your biggest growth comes from your biggest failures. Embrace them.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The only real mistake is the one from which we learn nothing.
quotes.author: Henry Ford

quotes.text: Success is stumbling from failure to failure with no loss of enthusiasm.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: The only time success comes before work is in the dictionary.
quotes.author: Vidal Sassoon

quotes.text: Creativity is just connecting things.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Innovation is saying no to a thousand things.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Less is more.
quotes.author: Ludwig Mies van der Rohe

quotes.text: Simplicity is the ultimate form of sophistication.
quotes.author: Leonardo da Vinci

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Will Durant

quotes.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.text: In the middle of difficulty lies opportunity.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
quotes.author: Henry David Thoreau

quotes.text: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
quotes.author: Walt Disney

quotes.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.author: Sam Levenson

quotes.text: The best revenge is massive success.
quotes.author: Frank Sinatra

quotes.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
quotes.author: Thomas Jefferson

quotes.text: Success is not final, failure is not fatal: it is the courage to continue that counts.
quotes.author: Winston Churchill

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: The art of being wise is the art of knowing what to overlook.
quotes.author: William James

quotes.text: The simplest solution is almost always the best one.
quotes.author: Sherlock Holmes

quotes.text: Everything should be made as simple as possible, but not simpler.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: The best design is the simplest one that works.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: Trailers are supposed to be pretty dumb. This is what makes them valuable from a logistical perspective. If we hyper focus on reducing the carbon footprint of each specific shipment we may find we created an overall increase in aggregate once the higher order and deferred consequences come to bear.
quotes.author: bob1029
quotes.source: Hacker News — Self-Powered Trailers Promise Leaner Freight Runs
quotes.extraction_note: Pithy insight on simplicity vs. over-optimization in systems design, directly applicable to software engineering.

quotes.text: Hardware's reputation derives from the reality that a lot of companies spin out the hardware before the software is even written - so all hardware bugs have to get fixed in software.
quotes.author: bjt12345
quotes.source: Hacker News — What I learned selling 2,500 MIDI recorders: Hardware is not so hard
quotes.extraction_note: Concise observation on the interplay between hardware and software development cycles, revealing real engineering trade-offs.
